steps.t: Fenmarch lies to the east of Aldburg, in the Eastmarch of Rohan. Thane Arcil is concerned about his neighbours in Fenmarch. He would like for you to p…
Fenmarch lies eastward upon the road. Patrol the road to Fenmarch.
There are no signs of trouble yet. You should continue to patrol the road to Fenmarch.
Screams can be heard off in the distance to the east. You should follow the screams to locate their source.
There is a panicked Rohirrim woman ahead and the screams are now much closer. Speak with the woman to find out what is happening.
